title: microlicia capitata
intro: Microlicia capitata is a species of flowering plant in the family Melastomataceae, commonly known as the "buttonbush tree" due to its distinctive spherical capitula. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include antimicrobial, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Microlicia capitata include its potential to treat various conditions such as fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues, as well as its ability to boost the immune system. Microlicia capitata can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are used to harness its medicinal properties and provide relief from various health issues.
